page_content:
PHSC399 Public Health Science Internship (1-6 Credits)

The Public Health Science internship will enable students to gain practical experience under conditions conducive to academic, research and professional development. The internship is a time-limited, supervised period of public health professional experience carried out ina related professional organization or research setting.

Restriction: Must be in Public Health Science program; and must have completed a minimum of 75 credits; and must have permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Credit Only Granted for. PHSC491 or SPHL491.
